creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2010-05-09 09:07:34 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11-fonts/xfs        Makefile 
    x11-fonts/xfs/files  xfs.in 
  Log:
  The xfs startup script source still uses the RC_SUBR macro, which
  is no longer expanded. This causes the installed script to fail.
  
  PR:             146413
  Submitted by:   Jimmy Olgeni <olgeni@freebsd.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.19      +1 -0      ports/x11-fonts/xfs/Makefile
  1.5       +2 -2      ports/x11-fonts/xfs/files/xfs.in
